mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_price_history (stock_id, base_date, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, created_date) VALUES (#{stockId}, #{baseDate}, #{price}, #{price}, #{price}, #{price}, #{amount}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE high_price = GREATEST(high_price, VALUES(high_price)), low_price = LEAST(low_price, VALUES(low_price)), close_price = VALUES(close_price), volume = volume + VALUES(volume), updated_date = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT history_id as historyId, stock_id as stockId, base_date as baseDate, open_price as openPrice, high_price as highPrice, low_price as lowPrice, close_price as closePrice, volume, created_date as createdDate, updated_date as updatedDate FROM stock_price_history WHERE stock_id = #{stockId} ORDER BY base_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE stocks s JOIN ( SELECT stock_id, close_price FROM stock_price_history h1 WHERE base_date = ( SELECT MAX(base_date) FROM stock_price_history h2 WHERE h1.stock_id = h2.stock_id ) ) latest ON s.stock_id = latest.stock_id SET s.prev_price = latest.close_price
